name: Wooden Sword
description: Wooden Sword is basic melee weapon used for close combat. It deals low damage but is easy to craft early in the game.

name: Stone Sword
description: A stone sword is a basic melee weapon that deals more damage than a wooden sword and is useful in early combat.

name: Copper Sword
description: A copper sword is a balanced melee weapon that offers better durability and performance than stone.

name: Iron Sword
description: An iron sword is a strong and reliable melee weapon that deals solid damage and is suitable for frequent combat.

name: Wooden Pickaxe
description: A wooden pickaxe is a basic mining tool used to gather simple resources like stone and coal.

name: Stone Pickaxe
description: A stone pickaxe is a stronger mining tool that can break tougher blocks such as iron ore.

name: Copper Pickaxe
description: A copper pickaxe is a durable mining tool that performs better than stone and lasts longer.

name: Iron Pickaxe
description: An iron pickaxe is a powerful mining tool used to extract valuable resources like diamonds and redstone.

name: Wooden Axe
description: A wooden axe is a simple tool used for chopping wood and can also be used for light combat.

name: Stone Axe
description: A stone axe is a more efficient tool for cutting trees and dealing slightly more damage in combat.

name: Copper Axe
description: A copper axe is a durable tool that chops wood faster and performs better than stone.

name: Iron Axe
description: An iron axe is a strong and efficient tool ideal for gathering wood quickly and handling combat.

name: Wooden Shovel
description: A wooden shovel is a basic digging tool used for collecting dirt, sand, and gravel.

name: Stone Shovel
description: A stone shovel is a sturdier digging tool that works faster and lasts longer than wood.

name: Copper Shovel
description: A copper shovel is a more durable digging tool that offers improved performance over stone.

name: Iron Shovel
description: An iron shovel is an efficient digging tool designed for fast digging and long use.

name: Wooden Hoe
description: A wooden hoe is a simple farming tool used to prepare soil for planting crops.

name: Stone Hoe
description: A stone hoe is a stronger farming tool that lasts longer while preparing farmland.

name: Copper Hoe
description: A copper hoe is a durable farming tool that improves efficiency compared to stone.

name: Iron Hoe
description: An iron hoe is a highly durable farming tool ideal for maintaining large farms.

name: Iron Helmet
description: An iron helmet is protective headgear that reduces incoming damage during combat.

name: Iron Chestplate
description: An iron chestplate is strong body armor that provides high protection for the torso.

name: Iron Leggings
description: Iron leggings are protective armor that cover the legs and increase overall defense.

name: Iron Boots
description: Iron boots are protective footwear that reduce damage and complete the armor set.

name: Copper Helmet
description: A copper helmet is protective headgear that provides basic defense and durability.

name: Copper Chestplate
description: A copper chestplate is body armor that offers moderate protection for the torso.

name: Copper Leggings
description: Copper leggings are protective armor that cover the legs and provide balanced defense.

name: Copper Boots
description: Copper boots are protective footwear that provide basic protection and complete the set.

name: Leather Helmet
description: A leather helmet is basic headgear that provides light protection in combat.

name: Leather Chestplate
description: A leather chestplate is body armor that offers basic protection for the torso.

name: Leather Leggings
description: Leather leggings are protective armor that cover the legs and provide light defense.

name: Leather Boots
description: Leather boots are protective footwear that provide basic protection and complete the armor set.
